CREATE TABLE another_table (id INT, category STRING);
SELECT category, histogram(value) FROM another_table JOIN test_table ON another_table.id = test_table.value GROUP BY category;
CREATE TABLE multi_table (group_id INT, value INT);
SELECT group_id, histogram(value) FROM multi_table GROUP BY group_id;
WITH subquery AS (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE value > 2) SELECT histogram(value) FROM subquery;
SELECT histogram(value) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL) AS filtered;
CREATE TABLE complex_table (a INT, b STRING);
SELECT b, histogram(a) FROM complex_table GROUP BY b;
SELECT histogram(a) FROM (SELECT a FROM (SELECT a FROM complex_table WHERE b = 'X') AS inner WHERE a > 0) AS outer;
